turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, meri beti ko allergy test karwana hai. Kisi allergist se milna tha.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji zaroor. Beti ka naam aur umar?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Tanisha Verma. 9 saal ki hai. Mera number hai 9712345670.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya. Dr. Anita Saraf paediatrics mein allergies bhi dekhti hain. Woh is week Saturday ko available hain — subah 10 baje ka slot hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Saturday 10 baje theek hai. Book kar dijiye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ho gaya! Tanisha Verma, Saturday 10 AM, Dr. Anita Saraf. SMS aayega. Kuch aur help chahiye?
